title: SPEEDWOX Side Cutters 7 Inch Wire Flush Cutters Angled Wire Cutting with Spring Functional Precision Tools for Cutting Electronics Wires Handmade and Any Clean Cut Needs
features: 【USAGE】 Suitable for cutting flush sprues and soft materials such as cable ties, small iron wire, electric wire, electronic pins, head pins, trimming plastic components, electronic repair, beading and other fine hobby work.

【MATERIAL】 Drop forged high carbon steel and heat treated for strength and durability. (Some oil on the surface to keep pliers free of rust, it will not affect the performance just wipe it clean with a rag or old towel.)
【DESIGN】 Dipped grip handles for anti-slip and comfort grip. The Spring-loaded action reduces muscle fatigue for easy one-handed operation.
【CAUTION】Please confirm the size before buying. Please inspect before every use. Do not use if damaged.
description: Product Description SPEEDWOX Precision Flush Cutters Size ·4.5" Flush Cutter: (120mm/4.7" x 53mm/2.08" x 10mm/0.39") / (L x W x H) ·5" Flush Cutter: (135mm/5.3" x 55mm/2.16" x 10mm/0.39") / (L x W x H) ·6" Flush Cutter: (165mm/6.5" x 55mm/2.16" x 11mm/0.43") / (L x W x H) ·7" Flush Cutter: (190mm/7.5" x 55mm/2.16" x 14.5mm/0.57") / (L x W x H) Hardened Cutting Edge ·Sharp and durable cutting edge makes a very clean and precise cut. 20°Angled head cutter ·20°Angled head provides a more natural feel and reduce wrist strain. Widely Application ·Suitable for cutting flush sprues and soft materials such as cable ties, small iron wire, electric wire, electronic pins, head pins, small chain, trimming plastic components, electronic repair, beading and other fine hobby work. Attention Keep out of children's reach. Please do not use the plier to cut hard material, steel wire and live wire. Use an all-purpose oil to lubricate the pliers. Keep the pliers protected from dust, moisture and other adverse conditions by storing them properly.
